testcase.name: test_pdf_export_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Endpoint returned 520 assert 520 in [400, 422] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pdf_export_iter28.py:47: in test_pdf_export_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Endpoint returned {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Endpoint returned 520 E assert 520 in [400, 422] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_pdf_export_requires_charts
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pdf_export_iter28.py:57: in test_pdf_export_requires_charts assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 520 E assert 520 == 400 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_pdf_export_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected auth error, got 520 assert 520 in [401, 422] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pdf_export_iter28.py:323: in test_pdf_export_requires_auth assert response.status_code in [401, 422], f"Expected auth error, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected auth error, got 520 E assert 520 in [401, 422] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
